name: Smothers Brothers
bio: The Smothers Brothers were the American duo of Tom and Dick Smothers, who blended folk music with comedy, Tommy playing the bumbling clown to Dick straight-man bassist, capped by Tommys catchphrase Mom always liked you best. Their CBS variety series The Smothers Brothers Comedy Hour became one of the most controversial programs of the Vietnam era, clashing repeatedly with network censors over political satire before its 1969 cancellation.

timeline.ev: Debuted as a folk-comedy act at the Purple Onion
First appeared on The Ed Sullivan Show
The Smothers Brothers Comedy Hour premiered on CBS
CBS fired the brothers over censorship disputes
Federal court ruled in their favor against CBS

accolades: George Carlin Freedom of Expression Award (2003)
Inducted into the Television Academy Hall of Fame (2010)

specials.t: The Two Sides of the Smothers Brothers
